grant_title: Forest Conservation Easements for Land Trusts (FCELT) Grant Program
project_area: Conservation of privately owned forested land through purchase of conservation easements
demographic_requirements: Eligible land trusts must be accredited
eligibility_summary: Competitive grants available for accredited land trusts to purchase conservation easements on privately owned forested land in New York State to protect forests from future development and support climate resiliency, erosion reduction, flood control, wildlife habitat, water/air filtration, and climate change mitigation.
